title: Overalls
description: Make leather pants turn into dyeable overalls!
body:
![banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac0afb3a3a941425bfa8efbba1197b7edd1ed673.png)

## Description
Overalls is a texture pack that replaces leather pants with a cute overalls that can be colored with any color you want.

## Important notes
- This package does not require Optifine
- Version that leather pants can be renamed instead: [OverallsOC](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overallsoc)
- You can dye your overalls through a armor color generator site: [GAMERGEEKS](https://www.gamergeeks.net/apps/minecraft/give-command-generator/armor)
- Command to get colored leather armor in creative mode: /give @a leather_leggings[dyed_color=3847130]
- Go to the gallery to see examples

## See More:
[CURSEFORGE](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/overalls)

[PLANET MINECRAFT](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/overalls-texture-pack/)
